SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT FATIMA D. MENDEZ ROMERO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,936.24 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, FATIMA D MENDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMERO, FATIMA D MENDEZ $1,936.24 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,036.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, FATIMA D MENDEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2020 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $876.42 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, FATIMA D MENDEZ
